reasoning: The control AC-4(12) focuses on enforcing secure information flow, particularly through the use of data type identifiers and secure transport mechanisms like TLS. In Kubernetes, this can be mapped to ensuring secure communication between components and enforcing TLS for ingress and service mesh communications. NetworkPolicies can be used to enforce secure communication paths, while Ingress configurations and service mesh settings can enforce TLS. Additionally, ensuring that the API server uses TLS for secure communication aligns with this control.
title: Information Flow Enforcement - Information flow enforcement | data type identifiers when transferring informati
